crime.value: Murder of a priest during confession
crime.quote: The priest having violated what should have been inviolable, the secrets of the confessional

victim.value: A priest who violated the sanctity of confession by revealing secrets
victim.quote: The priest having violated what should have been inviolable, the secrets of the confessional

closed_world.value: Russian imperial court and General Tchermayloff's household
closed_world.quote: in Russia the emperor's wish is an order, and from the moment that it is expressed, no subject would oppose it

culprit_and_motive.value: Vaninka killed the priest to prevent him from revealing her secrets
culprit_and_motive.quote: the whole terrible story, which Vaninka, crushed by her long struggle, had at last revealed to him

resolution.value: Emperor Paul judges the case after the general confesses the truth, leaving Vaninka's punishment to her conscience
resolution.quote: I leave her punishment in her own hands. If I understand her character, if any feeling of dignity remains

investigator.value: The narrative reveals the crime through the general's confession to Emperor Paul
investigator.quote: the general, at the feet of Paul, recounted to him, as his sovereign and judge, the whole terrible story

red_herring.value: The priest's violation of confessional secrets initially appears as the primary transgression, misdirecting from Vaninka's crime
red_herring.quote: The priest having violated what should have been inviolable, the secrets of the confessional

social_world.value: Imperial Russian autocracy where the emperor's wish is absolute law, military hierarchy, and noble privilege structure the narrative
social_world.quote: in Russia the emperor's wish is an order, and from the moment that it is expressed, no subject would oppose it

alibi.value: Foedor claims Vaninka was ignorant of his proposal and feelings to protect her from her father's suspicion
alibi.quote: Foedor answered, as he had promised, that Vaninka was ignorant of everything

reveal_mechanic.value: Vaninka's confession extracted through psychological pressure after the church scene, revealed through her father's account
reveal_mechanic.quote: Vaninka, crushed by her long struggle, had at last revealed to him, at night, after the scene in the church

media_and_audience.value: Public spectacle of punishment draws crowds, torture as public entertainment in St. Petersburg society
media_and_audience.quote: Although this kind of punishment was a common enough sight in St. Petersburg, it nevertheless attracted all passers-by

investigator_wound.value: General Tchermayloff's paternal love conflicts with his duty, mourning the destruction of his daughter
investigator_wound.quote: I mourn with him for the deadly blow which has struck him
